title: Trump said his mother was a mistress of the British royal family and watched it on TV whenever a cer...
body: Trump said his mother was a mistress of the British royal family and watched it on TV whenever a ceremony related to the royal family was held. He added that his mother repeatedly told him, referring to royal ceremonies: "Baby, Donald is so beautiful", and stressed that she really loved the royal family.

title: Trump warned the Islamic Republic: You don't know how to sign a non-binding agreement, you better be...
body: Trump warned the Islamic Republic: You don't know how to sign a non-binding agreement, you better be smart early. Donald Trump, the president of the United States, issued a warning and threatening message to the Islamic Republic on Wednesday, the 9th of July. Trump posted a photo of himself with a gun and a picture of multiple explosions in the background, writing: "Iran can't pull itself together. They don't know how to sign a non-binding agreement.

title: Scott Bassent, US Treasury Secretary, wrote on the social network X that following the US president'...
body: Scott Bassent, US Treasury Secretary, wrote on the social network X that following the US president's "maximum pressure" policy, inflation rates in Iran doubled and the value of the country's national currency declined rapidly. Mr Bassent says the measures are targeting and sanctioning Iran's "extreme economic crisis" program, Iran's shadow banking infrastructure internationally, its access to crypto-currencies, hidden transport fleets, arms supply networks, the financing of proxy groups in the region, as well as Chinese independent refineries that support Iran's oil trade.

title: The government news agency Esna reported that the dollar's free-market price was recorded today at 1...
body: The government news agency Esna reported that the dollar's free-market price was recorded today at 181,100 tomans. This is the highest recorded dollar price and the national currency of Iran has recorded its lowest value ever. The dollar has grown by 120 percent over ten months and more than doubled. @VahidOOnLine @VahidOnline

title: A senior U.S. Defense Department official said the cost of the war with Iran has so far reached $25...
body: A senior U.S. Defense Department official said the cost of the war with Iran has so far reached $25 billion, the first official estimate of the cost of the conflict.

title: During the hearing of the House Armed Services Committee, U.S. Secretary of War Pete Haggett, in a m...
body: During the hearing of the House Armed Services Committee, U.S. Secretary of War Pete Haggett, in a meeting with Adam Smith, defended the Trump administration's military strategy against Iran. Noting the success of Operation Pettak Midnight, Haggett said that Iran's nuclear facilities have been destroyed and buried underground and are now under daylight surveillance. In this controversial debate, Haggett likened Iran's approach to North Korean strategy, saying that Tehran intended to use its conventional missile shields to prevent Iran from slowly moving toward nuclear weapons; but President Trump saw its weakest moment and, with the cooperation of Israeli partners, took action that could only be taken by the United States.

body: The following audio file was released by government sources: "The message of the voice of Kalibaev addressed to the people of Iran narration of the Speaker of the Parliament of 6 enemy defeats" and sentences selected by government sources from this audio file: "The Speaker of the Parliament in an audio file addressed the people of Iran on the most important issues of the day, in particular the new design of the enemy to surrender the people of Iran. The main parts of the dialogue are as follows:

title: Mohammadbaker Khalifaff, the chairman of the Islamic Council's parliament, said in a recent voice me...
body: Mohammadbaker Khalifaff, the chairman of the Islamic Council's parliament, said in a recent voice message that the United States has taken a new step and wants to activate economic pressure and internal conflicts with naval sieges and media airstrikes to weaken or even collapse us from within. He went on to say that the best witness is Trump's positions that he is clearly dividing the country into two extreme and middle groups and then immediately speaks of a naval siege to force Iran to surrender through economic and internal pressure. Mohammadbaker Khalifaff in the voice file published on Wednesday, March 9, called for the preservation of Afghanistan and threatened that any political dispute is entirely in the hands of the new enemy.

title: Donald Trump, speaking to Axis on Wednesday, emphasized that the Iranian naval blockade would contin...
body: Donald Trump, speaking to Axis on Wednesday, emphasized that the Iranian naval blockade would continue until an agreement was agreed that would address U.S. nuclear concerns. He rejected Tehran's recent proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and postpone nuclear negotiations, noting that he considered the blockade to be somewhat more effective than the bombing. At the same time, three sources familiar with the Axis conversation revealed that the U.S. Central Command (Sentcom) had developed a plan to disrupt negotiations to disrupt the wave of attacks on the nuclear power plants of the United States and Iran.

title: U.S. Secretary of War Pete Haggett said the incident was still under investigation two months after...
body: U.S. Secretary of War Pete Haggett said the incident was still under investigation two months after the deadly attack on Minab Elementary School that killed more than 165 people. The comments were made in response to questions from Roe Kana, a California Democrat, who asked Haggett about the human costs and consequences of the attack. Haggett stressed that the incident could not be determined as a "disgraceful event". Last month, Haggett told reporters that an army general outside Central Command (CTC) was on duty to investigate the incident; however, he refused to answer questions about the cause of the attack and repeated that the U.S. official did not target civilians.

title: Oil prices have risen dramatically since President Donald Trump met with oil company executives to d...
body: Oil prices have risen dramatically since President Donald Trump met with oil company executives to discuss a months-long extension of Iran's siege of ports and shipping.

title: Yuri Oshakov, a Kremlin palace aide, reported on Wednesday, March 9, the 1.5 hour telephone conversa...
body: Yuri Oshakov, a Kremlin palace aide, reported on Wednesday, March 9, the 1.5 hour telephone conversation between Vladimir Putin and Donald Trump, describing the atmosphere of the call as "friendly and friendly". In the speech, Putin also condemned the recent ill-intention towards John Trump, expressed support for his decision to extend the ceasefire with the Islamic Republic and presented ideas for a solution to the Tehran nuclear program. In another part of the conversation, Trump expressed hope that an agreement would be reached to end the conflict in Ukraine. Putin also proposed a ceasefire in his country at the same time as the celebrations of Victory Day in May, which was accompanied by a positive response from Trump.

title: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: The Islamic Republic of Iran, by giving practical thanks for...
body: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: The Islamic Republic of Iran, by giving practical thanks for the blessing of exercising control over the Strait of Hormuz, will secure the Persian Gulf region and eliminate the hostile enemy’s misuse of this waterway. The legal frameworks and new management of the Strait of Hormuz will bring comfort and progress for the benefit of all nations in the region, and its economic blessings will bring joy to the hearts of the people—by the will of God, even if the disbelievers dislike it.

title: Hungary’s incoming leader Péter Magyar wants stronger rights for ethnic Hungarians in Ukraine before...
body: Hungary’s incoming leader Péter Magyar wants stronger rights for ethnic Hungarians in Ukraine before supporting Ukraine’s EU membership talks. He raised this with Antonio Costa as the EU pushes Hungary to drop its opposition to opening negotiations with Ukraine. Source: Bloomberg

title: Israel has expanded the restricted military zone in Gaza, according to new maps shared with aid grou...
body: Israel has expanded the restricted military zone in Gaza, according to new maps shared with aid groups, bringing nearly two-thirds of the territory under effective control. The newly marked “orange line” indicates areas where humanitarian organizations must coordinate movements with the Israeli military. While Israel says the changes are meant to support aid delivery and do not target civilians, many displaced Palestinians fear entering these zones could put them at risk. Aid access has also been reduced due to safety concerns. Source: Reuters

title: NEW: Hezbollah drone hit an Israeli military vehicle near Shomera (northern Israel) today. Vehicle c...
body: NEW: Hezbollah drone hit an Israeli military vehicle near Shomera (northern Israel) today. Vehicle caught fire, with secondary explosions (likely ammo). ~12 IDF soldiers were wounded.

title: Mali: JNIM and Tuareg rebels (FLA) captured a Malian army base in Hombori (central Mali), Mopti regi...
body: Mali: JNIM and Tuareg rebels (FLA) captured a Malian army base in Hombori (central Mali), Mopti region. JNIM claims full control of the camp. They also seized nearby checkpoints (Fana, Kassela). This is part of a coordinated offensive launched April 25, hitting multiple cities and bases (including Kidal, Gao, and central Mali).

title: Ret. Admiral William McRaven on Iran War: Putting boots on the ground? I would not recommend it. Ira...
body: Ret. Admiral William McRaven on Iran War: Putting boots on the ground? I would not recommend it. Iran is two and a half times the size of Texas… this would be incredibly hard. If the regime survives, Iran wins.

title: Greek Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis: Our goal is to transform our country into a regional—why n...
body: Greek Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis: Our goal is to transform our country into a regional—why not think more ambitiously—a global educational center, attracting foreign students to come and study here: initially from the Balkans, Europe, and the Middle East, and in the future from India, the United States, Asia, and Africa. These are individuals who, under certain conditions, could be educated here and, why not, later work in our country and strengthen the national economy.

title: Germany has lost ~200k jobs since mid-2025, with manufacturing hit hardest; especially high-skill, h...
body: Germany has lost ~200k jobs since mid-2025, with manufacturing hit hardest; especially high-skill, high-pay auto sector roles. Industry accounts for a big share (~124k lost in 2025 alone). Auto sector heavily impacted (~50k jobs cut). These are skilled, well-paid jobs (not low-skill work). Source: HSchaeferIW, derJamesJackson (at X)

title: Serbia and Israel signed a defence data-sharing deal to securely exchange classified info and speed...
body: Serbia and Israel signed a defence data-sharing deal to securely exchange classified info and speed up arms cooperation. It covers classified defence data, weapons deals, and tech transfers. This is designed to fast-track Israeli arms sales to Serbia.

title: Pakistan is adding advanced Chinese submarines as part of deepening defence ties with China. Pakista...
body: Pakistan is adding advanced Chinese submarines as part of deepening defence ties with China. Pakistan to receive 8 Hangor-class submarines (4 built in China, 4 locally via tech transfer). The four China-built boats (PNS Hangor, PNS Shushuk, PNS Mangro, PNS Ghazi) are currently in sea trials and nearing handover. The AIP system gives Pakistan significantly improved submerged endurance and stealth compared to its older French MESMA-retrofitted Agosta submarines. Source: Reuters

It must not continue to take the entire region — and ultimately the whole world — hostage. The military nuclear program in Iran must be ended. There must be no more strikes against Israel and the partners in the region.

title: NATO membership for Ukraine is currently not available European Defence and Space Commissioner Andre...
body: NATO membership for Ukraine is currently not available European Defence and Space Commissioner Andrew Kubilis said that the most effective union for Ukraine in the coming years may not be NATO or the EU, but the European Defence Union. It is about creating a union that integrates the defence capabilities of EU countries with Ukraine, the UK and Norway. This format will allow for a faster and more efficient combination of military resources without the long-term procedures for EU or NATO accession.

title: Ukraine is building a system of national resistance during a full-scale war Ukraine continues to for...
body: Ukraine is building a system of national resistance during a full-scale war Ukraine continues to form the infrastructure of national resistance even in the context of full-scale Moscow aggression. The system is already proving its effectiveness, enabling faster decision-making and increased coordination in response to threats. Key changes in the system With the new legislative decision, the post of Deputy Chief of Defence is introduced in local administrations. These posts will be occupied by current military personnel who will be discharged by the Minister of Defence of Ukraine. It is expected to significantly strengthen interaction between the civil and military sectors. It is important: these positions will remain even in the event of a transition to peace.

title: 🇪 Germany increases spending on defense and support to Ukraine in the budget 2027 The German governm...
body: 🇪 Germany increases spending on defense and support to Ukraine in the budget 2027 The German government has approved key parameters of the federal budget for 2027. The document provides for significant growth in government spending and debt financing, mainly through investment in defense and infrastructure. Key budget indicators: Overall spending will be EUR 543.3 billion (+3.6% year-on-year); New borrowing 196.5 billion euros (against 50.5 billion in 2024); Investments 118.5 billion euros, with a focus on transport, digitalisation and medicine. Defense spending will increase to EUR 105.8 billion in the basic budget (from 82.7 billion in 2026). Overall defence spending (from 144.97% in 2027) will be around EUR 3.9 billion in 2027.

title: According to Reuters, citing two U.S. officials with knowledge on the matter, agencies within the U....
body: According to Reuters, citing two U.S. officials with knowledge on the matter, agencies within the U.S. intelligence community have been given the direction of assessing the likelihood that Iranian decision-makers will react adversely if U.S. President Donald J. Trump declares a “unilateral” victory and moves to pull back from previous commitments to a conflict with the Gulf Nation.

title: The White House has released a photo of King Charles III and U.S. President Donald J. Trump with the...

title: According to the Wall Street Journal, citing U.S. officials, U.S. President Donald J. Trump has told...
body: According to the Wall Street Journal, citing U.S. officials, U.S. President Donald J. Trump has told his aids to prepare for an extended U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Per the report, President Trump sees pulling out of the conflict or resuming combat operations against Iran as far more risky than continuing to blockade vessels traveling to and from Iranian ports. This news follows reporting that the intelligence community was given direction to assess the risk of declaring a unilateral victory and pulling back from the ongoing conflict with Iran.

title: The Pentagon is considering outsourcing warship design and building to Korea and Japan with a propos...
body: The Pentagon is considering outsourcing warship design and building to Korea and Japan with a proposed $1.85 billion feasibility study into the project within the proposed budget for 2027, with the study to look at the feasibility of adopting or co-producing advanced hulls such as Japan’s Mogami-class and Korea’s Daegu-class frigates to supplement the U.S. Navy, according to USNI News.

title: His Majesty, King Charles lll joked about the ongoing construction on the White House’ East Wing dur...
body: His Majesty, King Charles lll joked about the ongoing construction on the White House’ East Wing during tonight State Dinner alongside President Trump, telling guests: “And if I may say so, it is a particular pleasure to be back in this wonderful building, the heart of your democracy. On this occasion, I cannot help noticing the readjustments to the East Wing, Mr. President, following your visit to Windsor Castle last year. And I'm sorry to say that we British, of course, made our own small attempt at real estate redevelopment of the White House in 1814.”

One of the Ukrainian drones fell on the territory of Kazakhstan.

title: Iran War The main events of the 29th of April The oil market was shaken again: the UAE authorities a...
body: Iran War The main events of the 29th of April The oil market was shaken again: the UAE authorities announced the withdrawal from OPEC from 1 May. For the cartel this was a blow on the principle of quotas, and for Saudi Arabia an unpleasant signal from a regional competitor. The emirates want to increase production, but without an open Ormuz their manoeuvres are still resting on logistics. ➡️In Bahrain they continue to press on the Iranian trail Five people were sentenced to life imprisonment for working for a special agent of Iran, another 25 were given 10 years for publishing flight reports and military support from the authorities.

title: The recent attack on Orsk by the Air Force affected Kazakhstan (not again, but again): in the territ...
body: The recent attack on Orsk by the Air Force affected Kazakhstan (not again, but again): in the territory of Aktobe region in the area of the village of Alimbetovka fell a drone of an unknown type. Local residents even recorded the moment of the fall of the ULA in this area. The event is not the first time in Kazakhstan in the last year recorded several similar incidents, when the territory of the country was either whole drones or some debris. True, the Kazakh authorities did not give an answer on any of the episodes.

title: #Summary morning on 30 April 2026 ▪️ In the Voronezh region last evening and night in the sky over t...
body: #Summary morning on 30 April 2026 ▪️ In the Voronezh region last evening and night in the sky over two cities and 11 regions of the region 43 enemy UAVs were found and destroyed. A total of 189 Ukrainian aircraft type drnoas were shot down over the Astrakhan, Belgorod, Bryan, Volgograd, Voronezh, Kursk, Lipetsk, Nizhny Novgorod, Ryzant, Samara, Saratov, Tulsa and Ulyanovsk regions.

title: Pashinyan's election under the control of the American funds Representatives of Western organization...
body: Pashinyan's election under the control of the American funds Representatives of Western organizations continue to influence the preparation for the elections in Armenia, which are scheduled for June 7. On the day of the Armenian Central Election Commission, Chairman Vaaghan Ovakimyan received a delegation from the American International Election Systems Fund (IFES) led by Director Anthony Banbury to discuss the preparation for the elections.

title: Hawk presses An important moment in the Pentagon's head of state's hearings in the House of Represen...
body: Hawk presses An important moment in the Pentagon's head of state's hearings in the House of Representatives was Pete Hegsett's announcement of a $400 million freeze on so-called Ukraine. Who and when froze the funds? ▪️The global freeze on American military aid to Ukraine occurred on March 4, 2025, by order of Donald Trump amid a conflict with Vladimir Zelensky. ▪️Concretely, these funds were approved by Congress under the National Defense Act (NDAA) for the 2026 fiscal year for the Ukraine Security Assistance Initiative (USAI).

title: After a day after the attack on the unmanned boats west of Crimea, as well as the attack on the tank...
body: After a day after the attack on the unmanned boats west of Crimea, as well as the attack on the tanker, Ukrainian naval drones attacked the Kerch Strait in order to check/break the defense of the Crimea Bridge. And the battle was taken over by the FSB and the Rosgvardians. The heroism of the crew of the boats is not subject to question. It is very important how unexpected the attack became. If in essence, the attack simply failed, but only when the BECs appeared at the enemy's Kerch Strait.

title: Business is again guilty of the arrival of UAVs on oil bases An interesting trend has been noted: ev...
body: Business is again guilty of the arrival of UAVs on oil bases An interesting trend has been noted: every couple of months, when Ukrainian forces intensively attack rear facilities in Russia, the media are pushing the idea that owners and capitalists are to blame and must protect their property. This time with this idea, MP Mironov said that enterprises should defend themselves from drones. They should create their own units to protect against drones, and this should be their duty. Funny thing is that domestic corporations have already become concerned about their defense. They have their own security teams and maneuvering groups for defense.

title: Responsibility shift Trump's new initiative Talk about the Strait of Hormuz and do it completely dif...
body: Responsibility shift Trump's new initiative Talk about the Strait of Hormuz and do it completely different things. From the very beginning of the US military operation, Trump's plan has gone wrong: shipping has not been fully restored, and transit is being controlled by Iranian military personnel. And now, amid the silence and peaceful attempts at the White House, they have decided to go the other way again and involve an international coalition to provide shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. Somewhere we've heard this: ➡️ The White House has already proposed such an initiative during this active phase of the fighting. But then in Europe, they did it without prompting. ➡️ I'm writing to the US embassy and diplomats about this initiative.

title: Trial ball? about the Swedish seizure of the balker It has been almost two months since the Swedish...
body: Trial ball? about the Swedish seizure of the balker It has been almost two months since the Swedish coast guard seized the CAFFA dry cargo south of the Swedish coast. It was flying the flag of Guinea from Morocco to St. Petersburg with the mandarians on board. And he was accused of exporting grain from Crimea. 📌And here the fate is clear: the Swedish authorities officially seized the balker after a request for legal assistance from a foreign state.

body: ❗️Hezbollah’s Shomera strike damaged artillery battery Maariv reported on 30 April that Hezbollah carried out a precise explosive drone strike targeting an Israeli artillery battery’s munitions vehicle in the Shomera area, triggering secondary explosions that caused significant damage: "Hezbollah successfully carried out a precise strike on an artillery battery inside Israeli territory, causing significant damage. Twelve soldiers were injured, two of them moderately. Hezbollah directed an explosive drone at a vehicle known as an 'Alpha,' which carries the artillery shells for the battery. The impact triggered secondary explosions that intensified the damage to the unit. A fire broke out at the site, which firefighting teams later brought under control. body: German Chancellor Friedrich Mertz said on Thursday that Iran cannot take the entire world hostage by blocking the Strait of Hormuz.
